trigger_condition: Unique constraint is company_id+date but company owns multiple properties
guard_snippet: UNIQUE(property_id, date) -- not company_id+date
potential_consequence: Two properties in same group collide on same audit date

trigger_condition: Room count entered as 0 or negative during wizard Step 3
guard_snippet: if (roomCount <= 0) block_advance('Room count must be ≥ 1')
potential_consequence: RevPAR and occupancy calculations divide by zero throughout

trigger_condition: Property name is whitespace-only string, passes required field check
guard_snippet: if (name.trim().length === 0) block_advance('Property name required')
potential_consequence: Blank property name in sidebar, slug generation produces empty string

trigger_condition: User skips Step 5 and never returns; property stays permanently incomplete
guard_snippet: property.status = 'pending_first_upload'; dashboard shows prompt until resolved
potential_consequence: Property appears in sidebar with no data and no clear remediation path

trigger_condition: First file upload fails extraction entirely; AI has no labels to map
guard_snippet: if (extractedLabels.length === 0) skip_mapping_screen(); show_failure_flow(P1.5)
potential_consequence: Mapping screen renders empty; user blocked with no forward path

trigger_condition: User creates a new category during mapping with duplicate name of existing category
guard_snippet: if (categories.find(c => c.name.toLowerCase() === newName.toLowerCase())) reject_duplicate()
potential_consequence: Two categories with identical names; AI mapper ambiguity on all future uploads

trigger_condition: User abandons mapping screen mid-session without confirming
guard_snippet: on_unload: warn('Mappings not saved — confirm or discard?'); autosave draft mappings
potential_consequence: Upload file lost; property extractor profile not initialized; next upload re-triggers first-upload flow

trigger_condition: File is exactly 50 MB — boundary between accept and reject
guard_snippet: if (fileSize >= 50_000_000) reject(); // strictly less than 50 MB accepted
potential_consequence: Inconsistent behavior depending on whether check is > or >= 50 MB

trigger_condition: User uploads a second file while previous extraction is still in-flight
guard_snippet: if (extractionInProgress) reject_upload('Extraction in progress, please wait')
potential_consequence: Two concurrent extractions for same property/date; race condition on verify flow state

trigger_condition: No prior submissions exist; last-submission-date display is empty
guard_snippet: if (!lastSubmission) show('No prior submissions for this property')
potential_consequence: Undefined/null displayed instead of a first-time message

trigger_condition: User enters a future date when AI cannot determine audit date from file
guard_snippet: if (manualDate > today) warn('Audit date is in the future — confirm?')
potential_consequence: Future-dated audit stored; pace snapshot corrupts forward-looking forecast data

trigger_condition: User enters audit date more than 7 years in the past
guard_snippet: if (manualDate < today - 7yr) warn('Date exceeds retention policy — confirm?')
potential_consequence: File retained but date conflicts with 7-year retention window for older records

trigger_condition: Extraction exceeds 30-second SLA for reports >5 MB or >10 pages
guard_snippet: if (elapsed > 30s) show_timeout_state(); offer retry or manual entry
potential_consequence: UI hangs indefinitely; no fallback to manual entry triggered automatically

trigger_condition: All fields are green-confirmed but payment totals do not reconcile
guard_snippet: if (sum(payments) !== room_revenue + non_room_revenue) flag_reconciliation_warning()
potential_consequence: Financially inconsistent audit accepted silently; corrupts MTD revenue totals

trigger_condition: Red field is non-applicable for this property (e.g. competition with no competitors set up)
guard_snippet: if (field.required && !property.hasCompetitors) allow_skip_with_N_A_reason()
potential_consequence: User permanently blocked from submitting; red field cannot be filled or dismissed

trigger_condition: Overwriting a confirmed record that already fed downstream forecast calculations
guard_snippet: on_overwrite: invalidate_forecast_cache(date); recalculate_rolling_forecast()
potential_consequence: Forecast shows stale values derived from overwritten data until next submission

trigger_condition: Network drops mid-extraction; user never receives error or success
guard_snippet: timeout_guard: if no response in 60s, show_error_state with retry option
potential_consequence: Verify flow never loads; silent failure contradicts acceptance criterion

trigger_condition: User closes browser/tab during verify flow before submitting
guard_snippet: autosave verify state per session; resume_on_return if extraction_id still active
potential_consequence: User must re-upload and re-extract; extraction quota consumed twice

trigger_condition: Two categories share similar names and AI maps both to same category (false positive)
guard_snippet: if (confidence < threshold && multiple_candidates) force_yellow_with_disambiguation_choices()
potential_consequence: Revenue silently merged across distinct categories; reporting totals wrong

trigger_condition: A mapped category is deleted from Property Settings post-onboarding
guard_snippet: if (category.hasHistoricalRecords) block_delete('Category has historical data — archive instead')
potential_consequence: Historical revenue records orphaned; auto-mapper broken for subsequent uploads

trigger_condition: Two reports for the same property and same date uploaded; filename collision
guard_snippet: filename = `${slug}-${type}-${date}-${nanoid(4)}.${ext}` // add collision suffix
potential_consequence: Second upload overwrites first in storage silently despite UI showing both

trigger_condition: AI cannot determine both report type AND date from content
guard_snippet: if (!date) prompt_date(); if (!type) default_to('report'); combine both guards
potential_consequence: File stored as `[slug]-report-undefined.pdf` if date prompt not shown

trigger_condition: ZIP archive contains nested ZIPs
guard_snippet: if (file.isZip && depth > 1) skip_and_flag('Nested archives not supported')
potential_consequence: Infinite recursion or unpredictable partial processing of nested archives

trigger_condition: Two files in bulk batch have the same extracted audit date
guard_snippet: if (batchDates.hasDuplicate(extractedDate)) flag_conflict(files, extractedDate)
potential_consequence: One file silently overwrites the other; data loss with no user warning

trigger_condition: All files in bulk backfill batch fail extraction
guard_snippet: if (failedCount === totalCount) abort_backfill(); show_full_failure_state()
potential_consequence: Backfill summary shows 0 successes; no guidance on whether to proceed or abandon

trigger_condition: Second backfill initiated while first is still processing
guard_snippet: if (backfill.status === 'in_progress') block_new_backfill('Backfill already running')
potential_consequence: Concurrent backfills race on same date slots; duplicate or conflicting records

trigger_condition: Manual entry submitted for a date more than 365 days in the future
guard_snippet: if (entryDate > today + 365) reject('Manual entry allowed max 365 days ahead')
potential_consequence: Pace snapshot table grows with unbounded future placeholder rows

trigger_condition: ADR entered with Rooms Occupied = 0; room revenue = $0 but ADR nonzero
guard_snippet: if (roomsOccupied === 0 && adr > 0) warn('Rooms Occupied is 0 — ADR has no effect on revenue')
potential_consequence: Confusing UI state; owner may believe ADR is recorded when revenue derivation ignores it

trigger_condition: Property in a timezone where 'today' differs from server's today
guard_snippet: status_date = toLocalDate(now, property.timezone) // require timezone on property setup
potential_consequence: Property shows ⚠️ missing for a submission already received; or ✅ for a date not yet closed

trigger_condition: Ownership group has hundreds of properties; selector has no search/pagination
guard_snippet: if (properties.length > 20) show_searchable_dropdown() else show_list()
potential_consequence: Selector becomes unusable; large groups cannot navigate to specific property

trigger_condition: Property opened January when it started operations February last year — LY gap mid-month
guard_snippet: if (lyDataExists for some days in period) show partial LY with coverage indicator
potential_consequence: Chart renders incomplete LY line without explaining why some dates are missing

trigger_condition: LY value for a metric is 0; YoY % change is division by zero
guard_snippet: if (lyValue === 0) display '∞%' or 'N/A' instead of calculated percentage
potential_consequence: Divide-by-zero crashes chart render or displays NaN/Infinity to user

trigger_condition: Non-room revenue category has negative amount (refund exceeds revenue)
guard_snippet: allow negative values; render negative bars in donut/table with distinct color
potential_consequence: Donut chart receives negative segment; chart library throws or renders incorrectly

trigger_condition: Only competitor is deleted from settings after competition view was accessible
guard_snippet: if (property.competitors.length === 0) show_empty_state_with_add_competitor_prompt()
potential_consequence: View becomes inaccessible again without clear explanation of why

trigger_condition: No competitors have ≥ 7 days of data in selected period; chart is fully empty
guard_snippet: if (eligibleCompetitors.length === 0) show_empty_state('No competitor has 7+ days of data')
potential_consequence: Chart renders with axes but no lines; user cannot distinguish from broken chart

trigger_condition: All four forecast chart lines are unavailable simultaneously (new property, no budget, no LY)
guard_snippet: if (availableLines.length === 0) show_empty_state('Add budget and submit data to see forecast')
potential_consequence: Chart renders empty with no guidance; user has no path to remedy

trigger_condition: View accessed on last day of the month; chart has one future data point
guard_snippet: if (remainingDays === 0) show_message('Month ends today — no future dates to forecast')
potential_consequence: Forecast table has one row or zero rows with no explanation

trigger_condition: LY pace unavailable AND OTB is 0 for remaining dates; projection = $0
guard_snippet: if (otb === 0 && !lyPace) show_projection_as_unavailable, not $0
potential_consequence: Owner sees $0 forecast and believes property has no bookings when data is simply missing

trigger_condition: LY was a leap year; Feb 29 has no TY equivalent for PACE NET calculation
guard_snippet: if (lyDate === Feb29 && !isLeapYear(ty)) map to Feb 28 for comparison with note
potential_consequence: Feb 29 row throws null reference or shows NaN in PACE NET column

trigger_condition: User closes tab after adjusting budget controls without clicking 'Save as budget'
guard_snippet: beforeunload: warn('You have unsaved budget adjustments — save or discard?')
potential_consequence: Owner believes budget was updated; forecasts continue using old values silently

trigger_condition: Budget Occupancy input set above 100%
guard_snippet: if (budgetOccupancy > 100) clamp_to_100 or show_error('Occupancy cannot exceed 100%')
potential_consequence: RevPAR and revenue projections exceed physical capacity; nonsense forecast values

trigger_condition: Yellow threshold set equal to red threshold in property settings
guard_snippet: if (yellowLow <= redThreshold) reject_save('Yellow threshold must be above red threshold')
potential_consequence: Dates flip between yellow and red with no stable state; UI flickers or shows wrong color

trigger_condition: LY pickup rate at equivalent advance window was 0; pickup velocity comparison divides by zero
guard_snippet: if (lyPickupRate === 0) skip_velocity_alert or show 'No LY baseline available'
potential_consequence: Division by zero throws or produces Infinity alert; alert fires spuriously or crashes

trigger_condition: Pickup velocity alert has no defined resolution condition
guard_snippet: alert.resolved_when = 'pickupRate >= 50% of LY for 2 consecutive days' // define condition
potential_consequence: Alert never clears; sidebar badge persists indefinitely confusing owner

trigger_condition: 'LY distribution' seasonal split chosen but property has no LY data
guard_snippet: if (!property.hasLYData) disable_LY_distribution_option with tooltip explaining why
potential_consequence: LY distribution selected; all months receive 0 or undefined budget values

trigger_condition: CSV budget import contains duplicate category+month rows
guard_snippet: if (csv.hasDuplicates(category, month)) reject_with_line_numbers or use last-row-wins with warning
potential_consequence: Unpredictable budget values; last-row or first-row wins silently without user knowledge

trigger_condition: Fiscal year start date changed after year has begun; original budget re-lock point is ambiguous
guard_snippet: if (fiscalYearStart changed && year_in_progress) warn and re-confirm original budget lock
potential_consequence: Original budget column becomes editable mid-year, destroying read-only baseline

trigger_condition: Actuals submitted for a past date (backdated correction); rolling forecast not recalculated
guard_snippet: on_backdated_submission: trigger rolling_forecast_recalc(from=submission.date)
potential_consequence: Rolling forecast shows stale projection based on pre-correction actuals

trigger_condition: Data submission gaps exist within the N consecutive days window for variance alert
guard_snippet: define gap_handling: gaps count as missing (reset N) OR treated as worst-case (continue N)
potential_consequence: Alert fires on 3 days of real data plus 2 missing days, or never fires despite sustained underperformance

trigger_condition: Variance alert dismissed but underlying condition persists beyond dismissal
guard_snippet: after_dismiss: re-fire after M days if condition still met (define M, default 7)
potential_consequence: Alert suppressed indefinitely; owner never sees persistent underperformance signal again

trigger_condition: Variance threshold X set to 0%; alert fires every day regardless of performance
guard_snippet: if (X < 1) reject_save('Threshold must be at least 1%')
potential_consequence: Alert spam; badge always active; owner ignores all future alerts

trigger_condition: Alert detail links to forecast date range that no longer exists (month rolled over)
guard_snippet: if (forecastDate < today) redirect to historical view for that date instead
potential_consequence: Alert links to a 404 or empty forecast; owner loses context for the recommendation

trigger_condition: File record exists in DB but underlying file deleted from object storage
guard_snippet: on_download: if (!storage.exists(file.key)) show_error('File unavailable — contact support')
potential_consequence: Download button returns 404 or blank; no user-facing explanation

trigger_condition: Malware scan fails or times out; upload proceeds without scan result
guard_snippet: if (scanResult === 'timeout' || 'error') reject_upload('Security scan failed — try again')
potential_consequence: Unscanned files reach AI extraction pipeline; potential code execution in parser

trigger_condition: Night auditor account needs to be re-scoped to a different property
guard_snippet: define admin flow: GM can reassign auditor account to different property_id
potential_consequence: No mechanism to move auditor; orphaned account or GM must delete and recreate
